div.p: state = LEADER_ACTIVE pthread_mutex_unlock(&lock) fsync(log_fd) pthread_mutex_lock(&lock) last_synced_lsn = pending_sync_lsn state = INACTIVE pthread_cond_broadcast(&sync_complete)

ul.li: LEADER holds lock only during state updates (µs)
All FOLLOWERS batched into single fsync

div.p: Subsequent committers Wait on condition variable
